hooks.command: git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" fetch origin 2>&1 && git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" pull --ff-only 2>&1 || echo "WARNING: the-sports-page 'git pull --ff-only' FAILED -- local clone may be stale or diverged. Reconcile manually (git log HEAD..origin/main ; git status) BEFORE drafting or publishing. Do NOT start work from a stale clone."
